basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Post Doctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Chemistry/Chemical Engineering with Ph.D. work in water treatment/photocatalysis. Strong hands-on experience in nanomaterial synthesis, fabrication, functionalization, and characterization. Minimum of two first-author research articles in SCI-indexed international peer-reviewed journals.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Chemistry/Chemical Engineering with Ph.D. work in water treatment/photocatalysis. Strong hands-on experience in nanomaterial synthesis, fabrication, functionalization, and characterization. Minimum of two first-author research articles in SCI-indexed international peer-reviewed journals.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Salary 2026
IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Roorkee is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Chemistry or Chemical Engineering with specific experience in water treatment/photocatalysis and nanomaterial synthesis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Detailed instructions are provided in the "How to Apply" section of this article.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Post Doctoral Fellow position is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates need strong hands-on experience in nanomaterial synthesis, fabrication, functionalization, and characterization, along with at least two first-author publications in SCI-indexed journals.
